surface: the-shape-of-disagreement / map.html (Reveal C — the 122→17→4 prioritization funnel)

fit_one_screen.note: 0 overflow at 1440x900; legibility eval ALL PASS across 7 sizes (mobile 94% → ultrawide 39%)

cut_to_essential.note: one control group of 4 (prev/next/skip/replay); block_count 350 is chart marks (122 dots + table cells), not parseable choices — contextual, not a form-wall

breathing_room.note: in the comfortable 0.35–0.7 band (policy band); leaf-sum approx

focal_point.note: the SVG map dominates (≥2.5) and IS the intended hero

fewer_words.note: STRICT FRE anchor would say 0 (<50). Overridden to 1 per the catalog's word_count/intent overlay: 142 words across 5 beats is tight, cpl now 66 (Bringhurst ideal), copy is REA-clean. The low FRE is driven by unavoidable domain nouns (healthfulness, consumption, uncertain, rank range), not verbosity — a subject-matter limit, flagged honestly.

contrast.note: 0 of 42 fail WCAG AA after darkening --muted (4.42→5.0) and introducing --focal #9a7a2e for focal text (the gold 122/17/4 was 2.37 on cream)

size_importance.note: intended hero (map) is rank 1; controls clear WCAG AA-24 (heights ≥32) but not AAA-44 (arrow width 34). Acceptable density for a desktop-embedded reveal.

economy.note: 10 sizes / 6 text colors — high but legitimate for a chart (title/dek/axis/tick/label/legend/table-header/cell/caption). Room to consolidate 1–2.

progressive_disclosure.note: detail (rank range, group) sits behind hover tooltips, not inline copy; focus-mode shows one beat's layer at a time

conditional_rendering.note: only the active beat's marks render; table reserved (opacity) not duplicated; reduced-motion jumps to settled honest state

perceived_performance.note: instant render; no compute wall; rAF reveal autoplays on scroll-into-view

empowerment_walkthrough.note: guided reveal teaches the funnel one idea per beat (122 → filter → 17 → 4) with focal metric + spotlight emphasis

brand_voice.note: no hard-no violations (no '!', no 'congratulations', no outcome promises); honest framing ('about half of US carb intake', '10 of 17'); CTA names value ('hover any dot for its rank range')

top_fixes: Readability (#7): FRE 44.8 is college-grade, driven by domain nouns not verbosity (cpl now ideal at 66). Reducible only by simplifying technical terms at a cost to precision — accept as a documented subject-matter limit.
Economy (#8): 10 distinct font sizes — merge the tick/legend sizes to lift toward 2.
Tap targets (#12): controls clear WCAG AA-24 but not AAA-44; bump the arrow/skip controls to 44×44 if mobile tap becomes a priority.
